audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + đọc + N]]. Use đọc before written material to say what someone reads.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + đọc + N]]: Đọc is introduced as a transitive reading predicate selecting written or textual material.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + đọc + N

Use đọc before written material to say what someone reads. Example: [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc báo.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + đọc + N

Đọc is introduced as a transitive reading predicate selecting written or textual material. Literal example: [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc báo.]]

audienceSections.normal: Đọc is used with newspapers, magazines, stories, letters, and news. Reading aloud and studying a text are not distinguished yet.
audienceSections.expert: Đọc is used with newspapers, magazines, stories, letters, and news. Reading aloud and studying a text are not distinguished yet. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà ở thư viện.]] — Trần Thu Hà is at the library.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc báo.]] — Trần Thu Hà reads a newspaper.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc tạp chí.]] — Trần Thu Hà reads a magazine.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc truyện.]] — Trần Thu Hà reads a story.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc thư.]] — Trần Thu Hà reads a letter.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc tin tức.]] — Trần Thu Hà reads the news.
- [[grammar:Mỗi ngày, Trần Thu Hà đọc.]] — Every day, Trần Thu Hà reads.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Quốc Huy chọn tạp chí.]] — Nguyễn Quốc Huy chooses a magazine.
- [[grammar:Thư viện yên tĩnh.]] — The library is quiet.

- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc báo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 2.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc tạp chí.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 3.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc truyện.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 4.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc thư.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 5.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đọc tin tức.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 6.
- [[grammar:Mỗi ngày, Trần Thu Hà đọc.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 7.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Quốc Huy chọn tạp chí.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 8.
- [[grammar:Thư viện yên tĩnh.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 9.
